description: Fork of vscode-clangd, C/C++ completion, navigation, and insights
clangd.path.description: The path to clangd executable, e.g.: /usr/bin/clangd.
clangd.useScriptAsExecutable.description: Allows the path to be a script e.g.: clangd.sh.
clangd.trace.description: Names a file that clangd should log a performance trace to, in chrome trace-viewer JSON format.
clangd.semanticHighlighting.deprecationM: Legacy semanticHighlights is no longer supported. Please use `editor.semanticHighlighting.enabled` instead.
clangd.fallbackFlags.description: Extra clang flags used to parse files when no compilation database is found.
clangd.serverCompletionRanking.descripti: Always rank completion items on the server as you type. This produces more accurate results at the cost of higher latency than client-side filtering.
clangd.restartAfterCrash.description: Auto restart clangd (up to 4 times) if it crashes.
clangd.checkUpdates.description: Check for language server updates on startup.
clangd.onConfigChanged.description: What to do when clangd configuration files are changed. Ignored for clangd 12+, which can reload such files itself; however, this can be overridden with clangd.onConfigChangedForceEnable.
Prompt the user for restarting the server
clangd.onConfigChangedForceEnable.descri: Force enable of "On Config Changed" option regardless of clangd version.
clangd.detectExtensionConflicts.descript: Warn about conflicting extensions and suggest disabling them.
clangd.inactiveRegions.useBackgroundHigh: Use a background highlight rather than opacity to identify inactive preprocessor regions.
clangd.inactiveRegions.opacity.descripti: Opacity of inactive regions (used only if clangd.inactiveRegions.useBackgroundHighlight=false)
clangd.enableCodeCompletion.description: Enable code completion provided by the language server
clangd.enableHover.description: Enable hovers provided by the language server
clangd.useBuiltInClangdIfAvailable.descr: Use bundled clangd server if available (linux-x64, linux-arm64, win32-x64), otherwise use the clangd binary specified in clangd.path.
clangd.preferBundledClangd.description: Use bundled clangd server if available (linux-x64, linux-arm64, win32-x64), otherwise use the clangd binary specified in clangd.path.
clangd.headerInsertion.description: Controls how clangd inserts missing #include directives.
Always include the canonical header, even if it's already transitively included
colors.clangd.inactiveRegions.background: Background color of inactive code regions (used only if clangd.inactiveRegions.useBackgroundHighlight=true)
commands.clangd.switchheadersource.title: Switch Between Source/Header
commands.clangd.install.title: Download language server
commands.clangd.update.title: Check for language server update
commands.clangd.activate.title: Manually activate extension
commands.clangd.restart.title: Restart language server
commands.clangd.shutdown.title: Shutdown language server
commands.clangd.typeHierarchy.title: Open Type Hierarchy
commands.clangd.memoryUsage.title: Show memory usage
commands.clangd.memoryUsage.close.title: Close memory usage view
commands.clangd.ast.title: Show AST
commands.clangd.ast.close.title: Close AST view
commands.clangd.projectConfig.title: Open project configuration file
commands.clangd.userConfig.title: Open user configuration file
commands.clangd.inlayHints.toggle.title: Toggle inlay hints
commands.clangd.showDocumentation.title: Show symbol documentation under cursor
commands.clangd.createClangdConfigFile.t: Create clangd configuration file in workspace folder
views.explorer.clangd.memoryUsage.name: clangd Memory Usage
views.explorer.clangd.ast.name: AST
capabilities.untrustedWorkspaces.descrip: Clangd isn't safe to run on untrusted code as it embeds clang as a parser. Parsing source files as one navigates a code base, carries the risk of being exploited.
clangd.disabled: Language features from Clangd are currently disabled. Would you like to enable them?
clangd.conflict: You have both the Microsoft C++ (cpptools) extension and clangd extension enabled. The Microsoft IntelliSense features conflict with clangd's code completion, diagnostics etc.
